title: P0-3 OpenSpec-style store UX pasteable recovery errors
description: Missing-store / unbound / no-write-target errors emit full pasteable fabric store recovery commands via FabricError.actionHint + first-hit remediations + doctor store copy (en/zh).
action: Upgrade store bind/mount/missing/no-write-target paths so every failure surfaces pasteable multi-line remediation strings of the form `fabric store bind <alias>`, `fabric store switch-write <alias>`, `fabric store mount <path-or-remote>`, `fabric install`. Prefer FabricError subclasses (StoreWriteTargetUnresolvedError pattern in packages/shared/src/errors/config-error.ts) + renderFabricError actionHint; strengthen packages/cli/src/store/first-hit.ts remediationFor() and packages/cli/src/store/doctor-checks.ts i18n keys doctor.store.unbound / doctor.store.no-write-target.

criteria: first-hit remediationFor('unbound'|'no_write_target'|'missing_required') returns at least one full pasteable line starting with `fabric store bind` (exact substring)
store-ops or first-hit tests assert remediation strings include `fabric store switch-write` for no_write_target / write path failures
doctor.store.unbound and doctor.store.no-write-target i18n strings in en.ts and zh-CN.ts each contain pasteable `fabric store bind` command text
Any new/changed store CLI throw paths that use FabricError include non-empty actionHint with a fabric store … command
convergence.verification: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- store-ops; pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- first-hit; rg -n 'fabric store bind' packages/cli/src/store/first-hit.ts packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/en.ts packages/shared/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts
convergence.definition_of_done: User who hits missing/unbound/no-write-target can copy-paste recovery commands from the error without reading docs.

files.change: Ensure every FirstHitCode failure remediations[] is pasteable full CLI lines (no prose-only hints). Prefer concrete: fabric install / fabric store bind <alias> / fabric store switch-write <alias> / fabric store mount …

Where bare `throw new Error(...)` is used for operator-facing bind failures, migrate high-traffic paths to FabricError/ConfigError with actionHint = pasteable recovery command block; keep message short
Confirm unbound / no-write-target diagnostics use i18n keys with full pasteable commands (update keys if still prose-heavy)
If constructors accept actionHint, ensure default actionHint is multi-line pasteable: fabric store bind <alias>\nfabric store switch-write <alias>
OpenSpec-style pasteable recovery copy with full fabric store … lines
ZH pasteable commands (keep fabric CLI tokens English)
Assert bind/unbound/no-write-target error paths expose fabric store bind / switch-write substrings
For unbound, no_write_target, missing_required: expect remediations some(r => r.includes('fabric store bind'))

implementation: Inventory throw sites in store-ops.ts (rg "throw new Error") and first-hit remediationFor branches
Standardize remediation helper e.g. pasteableStoreRemediations({ bind?: string, switchWrite?: string, mount?: string, install?: boolean }) returning string[]
Update i18n doctor.store.* messages so actionHint/message includes full commands users can paste
Ensure renderFabricError already prints `  -> ${err.actionHint}` — no renderer change required unless multi-line formatting needs fix
Add/extend unit tests for pasteable strings on P0 failure codes

success_metrics: pasteable fabric store bind present in remediations

reference.examples: first-hit remediationFor already returns ['fabric install', 'fabric store bind <alias>', ...] — strengthen completeness + store-ops throws

rationale.chosen_approach: OpenSpec-style pasteable recovery is a UX micro-transfer; Fabric already has actionHint + first-hit remediations — close gaps rather than invent new error UX.
rationale.tradeoffs: Migrating all bare throws to FabricError may be larger than needed — prioritize operator-facing bind/write-target/missing paths only

risks: Over-migrating internal throws breaks tests expecting Error message strings — keep message stable, put commands in actionHint/remediations
i18n key drift en vs zh — update both locales
